Was Vernadsky a Russian or Ukrainian sci: Shin Vernadsky masanin kimiyyar Rasha ne ko kuwa na Ukraine?
He is claimed by both nations. He was bo: Duk kasashen biyu suna ikirarin mallakarsa. An haife shi a Daular Rasha a cikin dangi mai tushen Cossack na Ukraine, ya bayyana kansa da al'adun Rasha da na Ukraine, kuma ya kasance ginshiki ga duka makarantun kimiyyar Rasha da na Ukraine (Academies of Sciences).
Born in Zhytomyr, Russian Empire (now Uk: An haife shi a Zhytomyr, Daular Rasha (Ukraine ta yanzu).
Co-founds the Group for the Study of Rea: Ya hada hannu wajen kafa Group for the Study of Reactive Motion (GIRD), wata muhimmiyar kungiyar binciken rokoki ta Soviet.
Arrested during Stalin's Great Purge and: An kama shi lokacin babban kisan gilla na Stalin (Great Purge) sannan an yanke masa hukuncin shekaru 10 a sansanin aiki mai tsanani (labor camp).
Released from prison by a special decree: An sake shi daga gidan yari ta wata doka ta musamman, kodayake ba a wanke sunansa ba sai a shekarar 1957.
As Chief Designer, he oversees the succe: A matsayinsa na Babban Injiniya (Chief Designer), ya kula da nasarar kaddamar da Sputnik 1, tauraron dan adam na farko na duniya.
Oversees the Vostok 1 mission, which mak: Ya kula da tafiyar Vostok 1, wadda ta sanya Yuri Gagarin ya zama mutum na farko da ya zagaya duniya.
Dies during surgery. His identity as the: Ya mutu lokacin da ake yi masa tiyata. A karshe an bayyana asalin sa na 'Babban Injiniya' ga jama'a, sannan aka binne shi da girmamawa ta kasa a Kremlin Wall Necropolis.
Designed the world's first intercontinen: Ya kera makami mai linzami na farko na ICBM (intercontinental ballistic missile), wanda aka sauya shi ya zama motar kaddamar da Sputnik da Vostok.
Led the program that launched Sputnik 1,: Ya jagoranci tsarin da ya kaddamar da Sputnik 1, tauraron dan adam na farko, wanda ya kaddamar da Zamanin Sararin Samaniya (Space Age) da Kuma Gasar Sararin Samaniya (Space Race).
Masterminded the Vostok program, which s: Shi ne ya tsara tsarin Vostok, wanda ya yi nasarar tura Yuri Gagarin cikin sararin samaniya a matsayin mutum na farko a can.
First Lunar and Planetary Probes: Bincike na Farko na Wata da sauran Taurari
Oversaw the Luna program, which achieved: Ya kula da tsarin Luna, wanda ya samu nasarar tabo wata a karon farko (Luna 2) da kuma daukar hotunan bayan wata a karon farko (Luna 3).
Why was Sergei Korolev's identity kept s: Me yasa aka boye asalin Sergei Korolev?
His role as 'Chief Designer' was a state: Matsayinsa na 'Babban Injiniya' ya kasance sirrin kasa don kare shi daga yunkurin kisa na kasashen waje sannan a bayyana nasarorin Soviet a matsayin aikin daukacin mutane gaba daya, maimakon mutum guda.
He died from heart failure during what w: Ya mutu ne sakamakon bugun zuciya lokacin da ake yi masa tiyata ta yau da kullum don cire polyp. Lafiyarsa ta lalace gaba daya sakamakon shekarun da ya shafe a Gulag.
How did he get out of the Kolyma Gulag?: Yaya ya fita daga Kolyma Gulag?
Fellow aviation designer Andrei Tupolev,: Masanin kera jiragen sama Andrei Tupolev, wanda shi ma dan yarin siyasa ne a gidan yari na musamman (sharashka), ya shiga maganar da kansa sannan ya nemi a mayar da Korolev zuwa ofishin gudanarwarsa don yin aiki a kan jiragen saman soja.
Korolev is considered the father of prac: Ana kallon Korolev a matsayin uban ilimin sararin samaniya na zahiri (practical astronautics). Tunaninsa da kokarinsa na gaske su ne manyan dalilan nasarorin farko na sararin samaniya na Soviet wadanda suka tsara farkon Zamanin Sararin Samaniya.
An haife shi a Veliky Ustyug, Rasha.
Recruited for Siberian service as a Coss: An dauke shi aikin Cossack a Siberia.
Embarks on the epic sea voyage from the: Ya fara tafiyarsa ta teku mai girma daga kogin Kolyma, yana zagaye Chukchi Peninsula.
After being shipwrecked, reaches the Ana: Bayan jirginsa ya lalace, ya isa kogin Anadyr sannan ya kafa sansanin Anadyrsk.
Discovers a major walrus rookery, a key: Ya gano wani babban wurin walrus, wanda yake zama muhimmiyar hanyar samun hauren giwa mai kima.
Travels overland from Yakutsk to Moscow: Ya yi tafiya ta kasa daga Yakutsk zuwa Moscow don tura kyauta, wata tafiya da ta dauki shekara daya.
Dies in Moscow while on official busines: Ya mutu a Moscow lokacin da yake kan aikin gwamnati.
German historian Gerhardt Friedrich Müll: Masanan tarihi na Jamus Gerhardt Friedrich Muller ya gano rahotannin Dezhnev a cikin rumbun adana bayanai na Yakutsk, wanda a karshe ya bayyana nasararsa ga duniya.
First European Circumnavigation of the C: Tafiyar Turai ta Farko a Zagaye Chukchi Peninsula
He became the first recorded European to: Ya zama Turai na farko da aka rubuta ya ratsa ta hanyar ruwa da ke raba Asiya da Arewacin Amurka, wadda yanzu ake kira Bering Strait.
Proving Asia and North America are Separ: Tabbatar da cewa Asiya da Arewacin Amurka sun Rabule
His voyage provided the first concrete e: Tafiyarsa ta samar da shaidar farko ta zahiri cewa daukacin kasashen biyu ba su da hanyar kasa.
He founded the Anadyrsk ostrog, the firs: Ya kafa sansanin Anadyrsk, sansanin farko na Rasha a Chukotka, sannan ya binciki kwarin kogin Anadyr.
Why is it called the Bering Strait and n: Me yasa ake kiransa Bering Strait maimakon Dezhnev Strait?
Dezhnev's detailed report of his voyage: An adana cikakken rahoton Dezhnev na tafiyarsa a cikin rumbun adana bayanai na gwamnati a Yakutsk kuma ba a san shi sosai ba. An sake gano shi ne a shekarar 1736, shekaru da dama bayan mai bincike na Danish Vitus Bering, wanda ke aiki a cikin Rundunar Sojan Ruwa ta Rasha, ya ratsa wadannan ruwayen a shekarar 1728 sannan aka sanya wa hanyar ruwa sunansa.
What was the primary goal of Dezhnev's 1: Menene babban burin tafiyar Dezhnev ta shekarar 1648?
The main purpose was economic, not purel: Babban dalilin tattalin arziki ne, ba wai na kimiyya kawai ba. Tafiyar ta nemi albarkatu masu kima, musamman hauren giwa na walrus ('hakoran kifi') da kuma fatar dabba ta sable, wadanda suka kasance abubuwa masu kima na kasuwanci.
What happened to Dezhnev after his famou: Me ya faru da Dezhnev bayan shahararriyar tafiyarsa?
He spent over a decade in the Anadyr reg: Ya shafe fiye da shekaru goma a yankin Anadyr, yana tara kyaututtuka da kuma bincike. Daga baya ya yi aiki a Yakutsk sannan ya yi tafiya ta kasa mai ban mamaki zuwa Moscow don tura manyan kyaututtuka da ya tara. Ya mutu a Moscow a shekarar 1673, a matsayin ataman na Cossack mai daraja amma ba shi da shahara sosai.
Believed to have been born in the Rustav: Ana kyautata zaton an haife shi a yankin Rustavi na Georgia.
Active during the reign of Queen Tamar,: Ya kasance mai aiki lokacin mulkin Sarauniya Tamar, yana aiki a fadarta, wataƙila a matsayin Royal Treasurer (Mechurchletukhutsesi).
Composed his magnum opus, 'The Knight in: Ya rubuta babban littafinsa, 'The Knight in the Panther's Skin'.
According to legend, he retired to the G: Bisa ga tatsuniyoyi, ya yi ritaya zuwa Monastery of the Cross na Georgia da ke Jerusalem.
Estimated year of death, possibly in Jer: Kimanin shekarar mutuwarsa, wataƙila a Jerusalem.
The Knight in the Panther's Skin (ვეფხის: The Knight in the Panther's Skin (ვეფხისტყაოსანი)
Authored Georgia's national epic poem, a: Ya rubuta shahararren wasan kwaikwayo na kasa na Georgia, babban aikin adabi na Lokacin Tsakiya (medieval literature) wanda ke yaba wa soyayya, abota, da kuma dabi'u na jarumtaka.
Pinnacle of the Georgian Golden Age: Mafi Girman Lokacin Zinariya na Georgia
His work is considered the highest liter: Ana kallon aikinsa a matsayin babban nasarar adabi ta lokacin al'adu da siyasa mafi wadata na Georgia.
His poem played a crucial role in shapin: Wakar dinsa ta taka rawar gani wajen tsara da kuma daidaita harshen adabi na Georgia na zamani.
Is 'The Knight in the Panther's Skin' a: Shin 'The Knight in the Panther's Skin' labari ne na gaske?
It is a work of fiction, an epic poem th: Aiki ne na almara, wakar tarihi ce wadda ke hada soyayya, kasada, da kuma manufofin falsafa, ba wai tarihin gaske ba ne.
What was his relationship with Queen Tam: Yaya dangantakarsa take da Sarauniya Tamar?
He served in her court, possibly as Roya: Ya yi aiki a fadarta, wataƙila a matsayin Royal Treasurer. Tatsuniyoyi sun nuna cewa yana son ta a asiri kuma ya sadaukar da wakar gare ta, amma ba a tabbatar da hakan ta tarihi ba.
Why is so little known about his life?: Me yasa aka san kadan game da rayuwarsa?
Few contemporary records from 12th-centu: Bayanai kalilan ne na lokacin daga karni na 12 na Georgia suka rage, kuma wadanda ke nan sun fi mayar da hankali kan sarakuna da al'amuran soja maimakon mawaƙan, kodayake shahararru.
Where can one see the supposed portrait: Ina mutum zai iya ganin hoton Rustaveli?
A fresco on a pillar in the Monastery of: Akwai wani fresco a kan bango a Monastery of the Cross da ke Jerusalem wanda aka saba amanna cewa shi ne hoton Rustaveli. An lalata na asali, amma copy ya rage.
An haife shi a Thessaly, Daular Byzantine.
Moved to Constantinople to teach private: Ya koma Constantinople don yin koyarwa ta kashin kansa bayan ya yi karatu a tsibirin Andros.
Appointed Archbishop of Thessalonica by: Sarki Theophilos ya nada shi a matsay인 Archbishop na Thessalonica.
Deposed as Archbishop following the offi: An cire shi daga matsayin Archbishop bayan karshen Byzantine Iconoclasm.
His fame reaches the Abbasid Caliph, who: Shahararsa ta kai ga Abbasid Caliph, wanda ya gayyace shi zuwa Baghdad. Leo ya ki yarda, wanda hakan ya sa ya sami goyon baya daga Sarkin Byzantine.
Appointed head (scholarch) of the newly: Bardas ya nada shi shugaban makarantar Magnaura School da aka sake kafawa.
Last known historical mention of him. Hi: Bayanin karshe na tarihi game da shi. Ainihin ranar mutuwarsa ba ta da tabbas.
He systematically collected and copied a: Ya tattara sosai sannan ya kwafe rubuce-rubucen Girka na da, inda ya kiyaye ayyukan lissafi, falsafa, da kuma kimiyya.
As head of the imperial university, he e: A matsayinsa na shugaban jami'ar sarki, ya koyar da sabbin dalibai, wanda ya kaddamar da Macedonian Renaissance.
He is credited with inventing a system o: Ana yaba masa da kirkiro tsarin fitilu (beacons), watau optical telegraph, wanda ya tashi a fadin Anatolia don bayar da gargadin hare-hare na Larabawa.
Why is he called 'the Mathematician'?: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'the Mathematician'?
While a polymath, his exceptional skill: Kodayake shi masanin fannoni daban-daban ne (polymath), gwanintarsa ta musamman a lissafi da dabarun tunani ita ce siffarsa mafi mahimmanci, wadda ta ba shi wannan lakabin. Ayyukansa sun hada da algebra da nazarin masana lissafi na Girka na da.
Did he really turn down an offer from th: Shin da gaske ne ya ki amincewa da tayin Caliph?
Yes, historical accounts state that the: E, bayanan tarihi sun nuna cewa Abbasid Caliph, da ya burge da iliminsa, ya yi masa tayin dukiya mai yawa don ya zo Baghdad. Leo, da goyon bayan Sarkin Byzantine, ya zabi ya zauna a Constantinople.
It was a 9th and 10th-century cultural r: Wani farfadowa ne na al'adu na karni na 9 da na 10 a Daular Byzantine, wanda ke nuna sabuwar sha'awa ga karatun Girka na da, fasaha, da kuma adabi. Leo ya kasance babban mutum a cikin wannan yunkurin.
Born as Ibrahim Qunanbaiuly in the Ching: An haife shi a matsayin Ibrahim Qunanbaiuly a Tsaunukan Chingis, Kazakhstan ta yanzu.
Attended a madrasa in Semipalatinsk, fol: Ya halarci makarantar addini (madrasa) a Semipalatinsk, sannan ya tafi makarantar Rasha, wanda ya ba shi ilimi na musamman na bangarori biyu.
Began to write poetry with serious dedic: Ya fara rubuta waka da sadaukarwa na gaske, inda ya dauki sunan bogi 'Abai'.
Wrote his major philosophical work, the: Ya rubuta babban aikinsa na falsafa, 'Book of Words' (Kara Sozder).
Died in the Zhidebay valley, shortly aft: Ya mutu a kwarin Zhidebay, jim kadan bayan mutuwar wani dansa, Magauiya.
Founder of Modern Kazakh Literature: Wanda ya Kafa Adabin Kazakh na Zamani
He reformed the Kazakh literary language: Ya gyara harshen adabi na Kazakh, inda ya shigo da sabbin siffofin waka, jigogi, da kuma kalar waka, wanda ya samar da tsarin rubutunsa na zamani.
A collection of 45 philosophical prose p: Tarin makaloli 45 na falsafa da misalai wadanda ke sukar al'ummar Kazakh sannan suke goyon bayan ilimi, dabi'u na kwarai, da kuma gyara.
He translated works by Russian and Europ: Ya fassara ayyukan marubuta na Rasha da na Turai kamar Pushkin, Lermontov, da kuma Goethe, inda ya shigo da sabbin ra'ayoyi ga mutanen Kazakh.
He composed over two dozen melodies for: Ya kera melodies sama da dozin biyu don wakokinsa na kashin kansa, wadanda suka zama muhimmiyar kashi ta kade-kade na gargajiya na Kazakh.
Why is he called Abai?: Me yasa ake kiran sa Abai?
'Abai' (meaning 'careful' or 'attentive': 'Abai' (wanda ke nufin 'mai hankali' ko 'mai lura') wani laƙabi ne da kakarsa Zere ta ba shi, wanda daga baya ya yi amfani da shi a matsayin sunan bogi. Sunansa na haihuwa shi ne Ibrahim.
Also known as the 'Book of Words' (Kara: Wanda kuma aka sani da 'Book of Words' (Kara Sozder), shi ne babban littafinsa, tarin bayanai 45 na falsafa a kan al'adun Kazakh, dabi'u, doka, da kuma makomar mutanensa.
No, he was also a gifted composer. He co: A'a, Abai kuma hazikin mai kera kade-kade ne. Ya kera melodies sama da dozin biyu, wadanda da yawa dari cikinsu suka mayar da wakokinsa su zama kade-kade na gargajiya na Kazakh.
Abai had a complex view. He was critical: Abai yana da ra'ayi mai sarkakiya. Ya soki manufofin mulkin mallaka na Tsarist amma ya girmama adabi da al'adun Rasha, inda yake kallon su a matsayin hanyar samun wayewa da ci gaba wadda za ta iya amfanar mutanen Kazakh idan aka bi ta da hankali.
Born in the village of Grigorovo, Nizhny: An haife shi a kauyen Grigorovo, yankin Nizhny Novgorod, a cikin dangin limamai.
Begins his public opposition to the litu: Ya fara nuna adawa a fili ga sauye-sauyen addini da Patriarch Nikon na Moscow ya kaddamar.
Arrested and exiled to Siberia with his: An kama shi sannan an tura shi gudun hijira zuwa Siberia tare da iyalinsa. Ya fuskanci wahala mai tsanani da tafiye-tafiye na tsawon shekaru goma.
Briefly returns to Moscow but refuses to: Ya koma Moscow na wani dan lokaci amma ya ki yin sulhu, wanda hakan ya sa aka sake kama shi sannan an tura shi gudun hijira zuwa Arewacin Rasha.
Defrocked and anathematized by the Great: An cire masa matsayin addini sannan Great Moscow Synod ta la'ane shi. An tsare shi a cikin rami na karkashin kasa a Pustozersk.
Writes his autobiography, 'The Life of A: Ya rubuta littafin tarihin rayuwarsa, 'The Life of Avvakum, Written by Himself', wanda yake zama babban aiki na adabin Rasha.
Burned at the stake in Pustozersk along: An kona shi a kan bishiya a Pustozersk tare da mabiyansa na kusa saboda 'babban sabo yaki da Tsar'.
Became the most prominent and unyielding: Ya zama mafi shahara kuma jajirtaccen jagora na Raskol (schism), wanda ya tara adawa yaki da sauye-sauyen coci da gwamnati ke goyon baya.
Wrote the first major Russian autobiogra: Ya rubuta littafin tarihin rayuwa na kashin kansa na farko a Rasha, babban aikin adabi na karni na 17 wanda aka sani da harshen yau da kullum da kuma zafafan kariya ga bangaskiyarsa.
What were the church reforms Avvakum opp: Menene sauye-sauyen coci da Avvakum ya nuna adawa da su?
Patriarch Nikon's reforms aimed to align: Sauye-sauyen Patriarch Nikon suna da burin daidaita ayyukan Rasha na Orthodox da Cocin Greek Orthodox. Wannan ya hada da canza alamar giciye daga yatsu biyu zuwa uku, canza rubutun sunan Yesu ('Isus' zuwa 'Iisus'), da kuma gyara littattafan addini. Avvakum da Old Believers sun kalli wadannan sauye-sauye a matsayin bidi'a.
Why is his autobiography so important?: Me yasa littafin tarihin rayuwarsa yake da matukar mahimmanci?
It was one of the first major works writ: Ya kasance daya daqun manyan ayyuka na farko da aka rubuta da harshen Rasha na yau da kullum maimakon formal Church Slavonic. Salonsa na kashin kansa da mai cike da zafi ya bude sabuwar hanya a adabin Rasha sannan ya samar da shaida mai karfi ga tafiyar Old Believer.
He is not recognized as a saint by the m: Ba a amince da shi a matsayin tsarkaka ba a babbar Cocin Russian Orthodox. Sai dai, ana girmama shi a matsayin tsarkaka da mai sadaukarwa na addini a cikin dariku da dama na Old Believers, wadanda ke kallon sa a matsayin mai kare bangaskiya ta gaskiya gaba daya.
Becomes co-ruler of the Huns with his br: Ya zama abokin mulki na Huns tare da dan uwansa Bleda.
Murders Bleda to become the sole ruler o: Ya kashe Bleda don ya zama sarki shi kadai na Daular Hunnic.
Launches a major invasion of the Balkans: Ya kaddamar da babban hari a Balkans sannan ya yi barazana ga Constantinople.
Invades Gaul and fights the Battle of th: Ya mamaye Gaul sannan ya yi Yakin Catalaunian Plains.
Invades Italy, sacks several cities, but: Ya mamaye Italiya, ya lalata birane da dama, amma bai taba Roma ba.
Dies on his wedding night; his empire co: Ya mutu a daren aurensu; masarautarsa ta rushe jim kadan bayan haka.
He united various Hunnic and Germanic tr: Ya hada kabilun Hunnic da na Germanic daban-daban ya zama dakarun yaki masu karfi karkashin mulkinsa shi kadai.
Subjugation of the Eastern Roman Empire: Murkushe Daular Roma ta Gabas (Eastern Roman Empire)
He repeatedly defeated the Eastern Roman: Ya kayar da sojojin Roma ta Gabas akai-akai, inda ya tilasta musu biyan kyaututtuka na zinariya masu yawa duk shekara.
He established a massive, though short-l: Ya kafa wata babbar daula, kodayake mara karko, wadda ta tashi daga kogin Ural zuwa Rhine da kuma daga Danube zuwa Tekun Baltic.
Why is he called the 'Scourge of God'?: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Scourge of God'?
Christian writers in Europe gave him thi: Marubuta Kirista a Turai sun ba shi wannan sunan, da imanin cewa yakokin da ya yi sun kasance hukunci ne na Allah saboda zunubansu.
Why didn't he conquer Rome in 452?: Me yasa bai ci Roma da yaki ba a shekarar 452?
Historians debate this. Reasons may incl: Masanan tarihi suna yin muhawara a kan wannan. Dalilan suna iya hada da roko daga Paparoma Leo I, cututtuka da yunwa a cikin sojojinsa, ko kuma barazanar harin Roma ta Gabas a kan mahaifarsa.
He died in 453 on the night of his weddi: Ya mutu a shekarar 453 a daren aurensu da wata sabuwar amarya mai suna Ildico. Dalilin da aka fi yarda da shi shi ne zubar da jini mai tsanani daga hanci ko ko zubar jini na ciki, wanda kila shaye-shaye ya karfafa shi.
An haife shi a Sayram, kasar Kazakhstan ta yanzu.
Travels to Bukhara to study under the re: Ya tafi Bukhara don yin karatu a karkashin shahararren malamin Sufi Yusuf Hamadani.
Briefly becomes the head of Hamadani's k: Ya zama shugaban khaneqah (wurin Sufi) na Hamadani na wani dan lokaci kaf인 ya koma mahaifarsa Yasi.
At age 63, in mourning for the Prophet M: Yana da shekaru 63, don nuna alhinin mutuwar Annabi Muhammad, ya koma wani daki na karkashin kasa (chilla-khana) don gudanar da rayuwarsa cikin tunani.
Dies in the city of Yasi (present-day Tu: Ya mutu a birnin Yasi (Turkistan ta yanzu, Kazakhstan), inda kabarinsa (mausoleum) yake yau.
Authored a collection of poems in the Tu: Ya rubuta tarin wakoki a cikin harshen Turkic, wanda ya mayar da tsarin Sufi mai sarkakiya ya kasance mai sauki ga talakawa na Tsakiyar Asiya.
Established the first major Turkic Sufi: Ya kafa kungiyar Sufi ta farko ta Turkic, wadda ta yada koyarwarsa sosai a cikin kasashen da ke jin harshen Turkic na tsawon daruruwan shekaru.
Pioneer of Turkic Religious Literature: Majagaba na Adabin Addini na Turkic
Elevated the status of the Turkic langua: Ya daukaka matsayin harshen Turkic don ya kasance kafar bayyana addini da sirrinsa, wanda ya yi tasiri a kan adabi na tsawon karni da dama.
Why is he called Ahmad Yasawi so importa: Me yasa Ahmad Yasawi yake da matukar mahimmanci?
It is his collection of poems, called 'h: Tarin wakokinsa ne, wadanda ake kira 'hikmats' (hikimomi), wadanda ke bayyana tsarin Sufism, dabi'u na kwarai, da kuma son Allah a cikin salo mai sauki ta amfani da karin waka na gargajiya na Turkic.
Why did he go underground at age 63?: Me yasa ya shiga karkashin kasa yana da shekaru 63?
He did so out of profound respect and mo: Ya yi hakan ne saboda tsananin girmamawa da alhinin mutuwar Annabi Muhammad, wanda ya mutu yana da shekaru 63. Yasawi ya ji cewa bai dace a gare shi ya ci gaba da zama a kan kasa yana kallon ranar da Annabi ba zai iya gani ba.
Born in the Porphyra chamber of the Grea: An haife ta a dakin Porphyra na Babban Fadar Constantinople, a matsayin yar farko ta Sarki Alexios I Komnenos da Irene Doukaina.
As a teenager, she witnesses the arrival: Lokacin da take matashiya, ta shaida zuwan shugabannin First Crusade a Constantinople, wani al'amari da daga baya za ta rubuta shi daki-daki.
Her father, Alexios I, dies. She and her: Mahaifinta Alexios I ya mutu. Ita da mahaifiyarta sun yi yunkurin shawo kansa ya nada mijinta, Nikephoros Bryennios, a matsayin magaji, amma abin ya gaza. Bayan haka, ta kulla makirci yaki da dan uwanta, sabon Sarki John II.
After her plot is discovered, she is str: Bayan an gano makircinta, an kwace kayanta sannan an tura ta gudun hijira zuwa Kecharitomene Monastery, wanda mahaifiyarta ta kafa.
Following the death of her husband, she: Bayan mutuwar mijinta, ta fara rubuta Alexiad, tarihin kashi 15 na mulkin mahaifinta, wanda kila ya kammala aikin da mijinta ya fara.
Dies in the monastery, having completed: Ta mutu a monastery, bayan ta kammala babban aikinta na tarihi.
She wrote the Alexiad, a 15-book histori: Ta rubuta Alexiad, tarihin kashi 15 wanda yake zama daya daqun manyan tushen tarihi na Daular Byzantine da kuma First Crusade.
She is widely regarded as one of the fir: Ana kallon ta a matsayin daya daqun marubutan tarihi mata na farko kuma mafi mahimmanci a Yammacin duniya, wanda ya kafa misali ga karatun mata.
Medical Administrator and Scholar: Mai Gudanar da Lafiya da Masaniya
She possessed extensive medical knowledg: Tana da babban ilimin likitanci, ta gudanar da babban asibiti da gidan marayu a Constantinople, sannan ta rubuta game da cututtuka da magunguna a cikin Alexiad.
Was Anna Komnene really supposed to be E: Shin da gaske ne Anna Komnene ya kamata ta zama Sarauniya?
As the firstborn child, she was initiall: A matsayinta na yar farko, ita ce magajiya ta farko da aka tsara sannan aka kulla yarjejeniyar aure da co-emperor, wanda ya sanya ta a kan layin mulki kai-tsaye. Matsayinta ya sauya bayan an haifi dan uwanta John sannan mahaifinsu ya nada shi a matsayin magaji.
It is a detailed account of the politica: Cikakken labari ne na tarihin siyasa da na soja na Daular Byzantine lokacin mulkin mahaifinta, Alexios I Komnenos, daga shekarar 1081 zuwa 1118. Ya kuma samar da hangen nesa na musamman na Byzantine a kan First Crusade.

Born, likely in the Principality of Mosc: An haife shi, wataƙila a Lardin Moscow, lokacin Zamanin Tatar Yoke.
Collaborated with Theophanes the Greek a: Ya yi aiki tare da Theophanes the Greek da kuma Prokhor na Gorodets a kan frescoes na Cathedral of the Annunciation a Moscow Kremlin.
Painted frescoes and the iconostasis in: Ya zana frescoes da iconostasis a Dormition Cathedral da ke Vladimir, tare da abokinsa Daniil Chyorny.

Moscow School of Painting: Makarantar Zana Hoto ta Moscow (Moscow School of Painting)
Considered a founder of the Moscow schoo: Ana kallon sa a matsayin wanda ya kafa makarantar Moscow na zana hoton icon, wanda ke da siffar salo mai taushi, kwanciyar hangali, da na ruhaniya.

Recognized by the Orthodox Church for hi: Cocin Orthodox ta gane shi saboda ibadarsa da babban mahimmancin ruhaniya na aikinsa na rayuwa, wanda ya daukaka hotunansa fiye da fasaha zuwa abubuwa masu tsarki.
Why is 'The Trinity' so famous?: Me yasa 'The Trinity' take da shahara sosai?

Was Andrei Rublev a real person?: Shin da gaske ne Andrei Rublev mutum ne na gaske?

In Orthodox Christianity, an icon is a h: A addinin Kirista na Orthodox, icon wani hoto ne mai tsarki da ake amfani da shi wajen ibada. Ana kallon sa a matsayin 'taga zuwa sama', bayanin addini ne da kala, maimakon kawai fasaha ta ado.
Did he work alone?: Shin ya yi aiki shi kadai ne?
No, it was common for icon painters to w: A'a, ya zama ruwan dare ga masu zana hotunan icon su yi aiki a cikin kungiyoyi. An rubuta cewa Rublev ya yi aiki kafada da kafada da gwanaye kamar Theophanes the Greek da kuma abokinsa na din-din-din Daniil Chyorny.
Born in Pereslavl-Zalessky, the second s: An haife shi a Pereslavl-Zalessky, dan na biyu na Prince Yaroslav Vsevolodovich.
Becomes Prince of Novgorod after his fat: Ya zama Prince na Novgorod bayan mahaifinsa ya tafi Kiev.
Leads his army to a decisive victory ove: Ya jagoranci sojojinsa zuwa gagarumar nasara yaki da Swedes a Yakin Neva, wanda ya ba shi sunan 'Nevsky'.
Defeats the Livonian Order (a branch of: Ya kayar da Livonian Order (reshen Teutonic Knights) a Yakin kan Kankara a tafkin Peipus.
Travels with his brother Andrey to the M: Ya tafi tare da dan uwansa Andrey zuwa babban birnin Mongol na Karakorum don Great Khan ya nada su a matsayin sarakuna.
Travels to the Golden Horde, receives th: Ya tafi Golden Horde, ya sami yarlik (shaidar ofis) sannan ya zama Grand Prince na Vladimir, babban sarki na Rasha.
Travels to the Horde's capital, Sarai, t: Ya tafi babban birnin Horde, Sarai, don rokon Khan ya dakatar da aikin soja da ya tsara a biranen Rasha, wanda ya haifar da boren jama'a.
Dies in Gorodets on his way back from Sa: Ya mutu a Gorodets lokacin da yake kan hanyarsa ta dawowa daga Sarai. An binne shi a birnin Vladimir.
Canonized as a saint of the Russian Orth: Cocin Russian Orthodox ta nada shi a matsayin tsarkaka saboda kariya ga bangaskiya da kasar.
Defeated a Swedish invasion force, secur: Ya kayar da dakarun mamaya na Sweden, wanda ya kare kan iyakar arewa sannan ya ba shi lakabin 'Nevsky'.
Decisively defeated the Teutonic Knights: Ya kayar da Teutonic Knights a kan daskararren tafkin Peipus, wanda ya dakatar da fadadarsu zuwa gabas a cikin Rus'.
Through pragmatic submission and diploma: Ta hanyar mika wuya ta zahiri da kuma diflomasiyya, ya kare sarakunan Rasha daga hare-hare na lalata na Mongol sannan ya kiyaye addinin Orthodox.
Venerated as a saint in the Russian Orth: Ana girmama shi a matsayin tsarkaka a cikin Cocin Russian Orthodox saboda rawarsa a matsayin mai kare Rus' da kuma addinin Orthodox.
He was given the name 'Nevsky', meaning: An ba shi sunan 'Nevsky', wanda ke nufin 'na Neva', don girmama babban nasararsa a kan Swedes a Yakin kogin Neva a shekarar 1240.
Why did Alexander Nevsky cooperate with: Me yasa Alexander Nevsky ya yi aiki tare da Mongols (Golden Horde)?
He made a pragmatic choice, viewing the: Ya yi zabi ne na zahiri, inda yake kallon Catholic Teutonic Knights da Swedes a matsayin babban barazana ga addini da al'adun Rasha. Mongols gaba daya suna da hakuri da addinan gida matukar ana biyan kyaututtuka, don haka mika wuya gare su ya hana lalata kasarsa da mutanensa gaba daya.
Is Alexander Nevsky considered a saint?: Shin ana kallon Alexander Nevsky a matsayin tsarkaka?
Yes, he was canonized as a saint by the: E, Cocin Russian Orthodox ta nada shi a matsayin tsarkaka a shekarar 1547. Ana bikin ranar sa ranar 23 ga Nuwamba.
It was a famous battle in 1242 where Nev: Wani shahararren yaki ne a shekarar 1242 inda sojojin Nevsky suka kayar da Teutonic Knights a kan daskararren saman tafkin Peipus. Ya yaudari sojojin zuwa kan kankara mara karfi, wadda ta cabe karkashin nauyinsu, wanda ya taimaka ga nasararsa.
Attends the Imperial Lyceum at Tsarskoye: Ya halarci Imperial Lyceum a Tsarskoye Selo.
Publishes his first long poem, 'Ruslan a: Ya buga wakarsa ta farko mai tsawo, 'Ruslan and Ludmila'; an tura shi gudun hijira saboda wakoki na siyasa.
Writes the historical drama 'Boris Godun: Ya rubuta wasan kwaikwayo na tarihi 'Boris Godunov'.
Marries Natalya Goncharova; completes 'E: Ya auri Natalya Goncharova; ya kammala 'Eugene Onegin'.
Fatally wounded in a duel with Georges d: Ya sami rauni mai tsanani a cikin fada da Georges d'Anthès sannan ya mutu bayan kwanaki biyu.
Founder of Modern Russian Literature: Wanda ya Kafa Adabin Rasha na Zamani
He created a new literary language that: Ya samar da sabon harshen adabi wanda ke hada maganganun yau da kullum da tsoffin tsarin coci, wanda ya kafa misali ga marubutan Rasha na karni na 19.
Authored the seminal 'novel in verse' th: Ya rubuta 'novel in verse' wanda ya zama tsari ga salon zahiri (realism) na adabin Rasha.
He excelled in multiple genres, includin: Ya yi fice a fannoni daban-daban, ciki har da wakoki na yau da kullum, wakoki na labari, wasannin kwaikwayo, gajerun labarai, da kuma novel.
Why is Pushkin so important to Russians?: Me yasa Pushkin yake da matukar mahimmanci ga mutanen Rasha?
He is considered the 'sun' of Russian po: Ana kallon sa a matsayin 'rana' ta wakokin Rasha da kuma uban harshensu na adabi na zamani, kamar yadda Shakespeare yake ga harshen Turanci.
He died from a wound sustained in a pist: Ya mutu ne sakamakon rauni da ya samu a yakin bindiga da Georges d'Anthès, wanda ake zargin mai son matarsa ne, wanda ya kalubalance shi don kare mutuncin iyalinsa.
Did Pushkin have African ancestry?: Shin Pushkin yana da tushen Afirka?
Yes, his maternal great-grandfather was: E, kakansa na wajen uwa shi ne Abram Petrovich Gannibal, wani yaro dan Afirka wanda Peter the Great ya rene shi sannan ya zama kwamandan soja.
Ascends to the throne after a successful: Ya hau karagar mulki bayan wani juyin mulki mai nasara, wanda ya fara mulkinsa a matsayin Sarkin Byzantine.
Issues a Golden Bull granting extensive: Ya kaddamar da Golden Bull wadda ke ba wa Venetians manyan gata na kasuwanci a madadin goyon bayan ruwa yaki da Normans.

Sends envoys to Pope Urban II at the Cou: Ya tura wakilai zuwa ga Paparoma Urban II a Majalisar Piacenza, yana neman taimakon soja yaki da Seljuk Turks.
